pageContext.name: Luke & Leia King & Queen Chess Piece Pair
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are proud to present a chess pair that is definitely strong with the Force, the Luke & Leia King & Queen Chess Piece Pair!  To conceal their existence from their father Darth Vader, twins Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa are separated at birth. Reunited, they become lynchpins in the rebellion against the Empire.  Star Wars fans, and those who love a good game of chess, be sure to add Luke & Leia to your collection today!
